title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: sudo bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for sudo is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The sudo packages contain the sudo utility which allows system administrators to provide certain users with the permission to execute privileged commands, which are used for system management purposes, without having to log in as root.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): sudo missing spacing and separator in log when using "--preserve-env=list" [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-105595)

full_text:
An update for sudo is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The sudo packages contain the sudo utility which allows system administrators to provide certain users with the permission to execute privileged commands, which are used for system management purposes, without having to log in as root.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): sudo missing spacing and separator in log when using "--preserve-env=list" [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-105595)
